what_it_does: Measures and dimensions creation use Builder mode by default (Public Preview): Builder mode, the UI based transformation tool, is now the default experience for editing measures and dimensions in metric views.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
